title: dactylorhiza markusii
intro: Dactylorhiza markusii, also known as Markus's Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of terrestrial orchid that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza markusii include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, and it is often prepared as a decoction or tincture for herbal remedies.
